items.author: xAI
items.title:
Two voices. One human. One AI. Can you guess the AI clone? 👇

Voice cloning, rich with natural emotion, is now live on the Grok Voice API.

https://x.ai/news/grok-custom-voices
items.blurb: xAI推出Grok Voice API语音克隆，支持自然情感表达。互动视频演示引人入胜，开发者速览。

items.author: Logan Kilpatrick
items.title:
We just shipped Webhooks in the Gemini API :) 

This is a big step towards making the DevX for long running tasks (batch, agents, GenMedia, etc) way better.
items.blurb: Gemini API上线Webhooks，大幅优化长任务如代理和批处理的开发者体验。Google AI官方认可。
